description_long: This is an adult female figure with a fair complexion, wearing a sleeveless, knee-length dress adorned with a floral pattern. The dress features a fitted bodice and a flared skirt, with the floral design split into two contrasting color sections. She is wearing classic closed-toe high-heeled shoes. Her hair is styled in an elegant updo with soft waves framing her face. The figure's arms are relaxed and slightly extended outward, and she has a poised, upright posture. No accessories or carried objects are visible.
description: An adult woman in a sleeveless floral dress and high heels, with hair styled in an updo and arms slightly extended.
description_view_0: Front view showing the floral dress, facial features, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the dress's fit, and the high-heeled shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the updo hairstyle, the dress's back, and the heels.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, arm, and the side seam of the dress.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless knee-length dress with fitted bodice and flared skirt
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly extended
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length hair styled in an elegant updo with soft waves
